identity.headline: Software Developer Intern | AI/ML | Data Enthusiast
identity.shortPositioning: I build AI-powered features for ERP/CRM workflows and business automation. I work end-to-end across backend, frontend, databases, and deployment with focus on clean architecture, reliability, and real-world product delivery.
identity.about: I am a fourth-year BSIT student and AI Engineer Intern building end-to-end AI-powered web applications for real business workflows. My stack includes Python, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, PostgreSQL, React, TypeScript, Docker, and deployment platforms like Coolify.
identity.aboutExtended: My interests center on LLM applications, RAG systems, tool-calling agents, backend architecture, production reliability, and business automation. I prioritize separation of concerns, maintainability, and product thinking over demo-only implementations.
identity.longTerm: I am growing toward AI engineering, MLOps/LLMOps, and production-ready intelligent systems that combine backend engineering, data systems, frontend UX, deployment, and evaluation.

availability.note: Available for AI engineering, backend, and product-focused collaborations.

heroStat.label: Internship Readiness Index
heroStat.detail: Focused on production-style AI system delivery

workValues.title: System Thinking
workValues.description: I design features with clear boundaries across API layers, business logic, and persistence.

workValues.title: Reliability First
workValues.description: I focus on maintainability, observability, and real-world edge handling before adding complexity.

workValues.title: Product Mindset
workValues.description: I build with end users and business workflow outcomes in mind, not just technical novelty.

bullets: Contribute to AI-powered ERP/CRM workflow automation

Apply clean architecture patterns for production readiness

journey.details: Formal IT training combined with strong project-first execution in software and data-driven systems.

Polytechnic University of the Philippines (PUP) Binan Campus
Consistent focus on practical software engineering and applied AI

journey.title: Portfolio Project Builder
journey.details: Developing end-to-end projects that mirror real client constraints and production architecture.

journey.title: Continuous AI Growth

stack.description: Modern, responsive interfaces with clean component architecture.
API-focused architecture and robust data-layer design.
LLM application workflows and retrieval-driven intelligence patterns.
Containerization, deployment, and team-ready collaboration workflows.

projects.title: AI CRM Assistant
projects.summary: Production-style AI CRM platform designed as an end-to-end business system, from service architecture to user workflows.
highlights: FastAPI backend with clean architecture and separated service layers
React + TypeScript frontend with business-focused user flows
PostgreSQL + SQLAlchemy integration for core CRM entities
Dockerized development and deployment-ready structure
projects.impact: Built to mirror real client-style constraints and demonstrate full product ownership from database to UI.

projects.title: AI Customer Support Copilot (Memory + RAG + Tool Calling)
projects.summary: End-to-end assistant for support operations that answers policy questions, routes intent, and triggers escalation when needed.
highlights: RAG pipeline for grounded support answers
Session memory for context-aware responses
Tool-calling for structured lookup actions
Routing and escalation logic for safer support flow
projects.impact: Demonstrates multi-step orchestration and practical AI behavior beyond single-shot chatbot interactions.

projects.title: RAG-from-Scratch-Employee-Handbook-Policy-Assistant
projects.summary: Document-aware assistant for employee handbook and policy use cases with retrieval quality and response trust as priorities.
highlights: PDF ingestion, chunking, and embedding pipeline
Vector retrieval for context-aware answering
Citation-aware responses with fallback behavior
Backend API service integrated with frontend query flow
projects.impact: Transforms static policy documents into usable operational knowledge for internal teams.

projects.title: Credit Risk Predictor
projects.summary: Machine learning project focused on practical risk prediction workflow, evaluation discipline, and business-driven outputs.
highlights: Structured ML workflow from feature prep to scoring concepts
Evaluation mindset centered on model behavior and tradeoffs
Business use-case framing for risk-related decision support
Deployment-aware thinking for real implementation constraints
projects.impact: Showcases data and ML fundamentals with attention to reliability and real decision contexts.

projects.title: PUP Biñan Website
projects.summary: A modern university website built to manage institutional content through a CMS-powered admin system. It supports dynamic updates for news, announcements, images, videos, header, and footer content, moving beyond a static website into a more scalable and maintainable platform.
highlights: CMS-driven content management for easier website updates
Admin-controlled sections for header, footer, images, videos, news, and announcements
Database-backed architecture instead of a static site
Built for scalability, maintainability, and easier content operations
Includes data analytics and visualization features for institutional insights
projects.impact: Creates a more professional, maintainable, and scalable web platform for PUP Biñan, with centralized content control and improved digital experience.

projects.title: ML Bulldozer Price Prediction
projects.summary: A machine learning project focused on predicting bulldozer sale prices using historical equipment and auction data through an end-to-end regression workflow.
highlights: End-to-end machine learning workflow for tabular regression
Data cleaning and preprocessing for structured equipment sales data
Feature engineering from historical bulldozer and auction records
Model training and evaluation for sale price prediction
Built as a practical portfolio project for applied machine learning
projects.impact: Demonstrates practical machine learning skills by solving a real-world price prediction problem, from raw data preparation to predictive modeling and evaluation.

projects.title: LabLens-AI
projects.summary: An AI-powered web application that analyzes blood chemistry report images, extracts biomarker values, compares them against reference ranges, and generates understandable health insights.
highlights: Upload and analyze blood chemistry report images
Extracts biomarker values from lab report images using AI
Compares results against reference ranges for quick interpretation
Tracks historical lab results and trends over time
Generates personalized lifestyle recommendations with medical disclaimer
projects.impact: Turns complex lab reports into a more understandable and user-friendly experience by combining image analysis, health data tracking, and AI-powered explanations in one system.

projects.title: Earthquake Fire Prediction ML
projects.summary: A machine learning project focused on predicting fire-related risk patterns using earthquake and environmental data through an end-to-end practical ML workflow.
highlights: End-to-end machine learning workflow for disaster-related prediction
Data cleaning and preprocessing for structured environmental and event data
Feature analysis to identify patterns connected to fire risk
Model training and evaluation for predictive performance
Built as a practical project for real-world risk prediction use cases
projects.impact: Demonstrates how machine learning can be applied to disaster and risk-related datasets to support data-driven analysis, prediction, and better understanding of possible fire-related outcomes.

projects.title: ML Heart Disease Prediction
projects.summary: A machine learning project built to predict the likelihood of heart disease based on patient health-related data through a complete healthcare-focused classification workflow.
highlights: End-to-end machine learning workflow for healthcare classification
Data cleaning and preprocessing of patient health data
Exploratory data analysis to understand patterns and risk factors
Model training and evaluation for heart disease prediction
Built as a practical project for real-world medical prediction use cases
projects.impact: Demonstrates how machine learning can be used to support early risk assessment and predictive analysis in healthcare through structured patient data and classification modeling.

highlights: Contributed to UI/UX, user research, and pitching for a pedestrian-safety solution.

hackathons.event: Ship or Be Shipped 2025 (Build & Ship PH)
highlights: Built 7 MVP AI agent applications during a 24-hour sprint.
Collaborated on product design and pitching.

hackathons.event: Pie & AI: Manila (AI Hive IOML Vibe Hack 2.0)
highlights: Built LabLens AI, an AI agent that helps users analyze lab results by extracting values, checking reference ranges, and generating easy-to-understand insights with basic recommendations (with disclaimer).

experienceResume.summary: Completing a Bachelor of Science in Information Technology at Polytechnic University of the Philippines (PUP) Binan Campus.
Gaining hands-on industry experience in software development, building real-world systems, and improving practical coding skills.

experienceResume.track: The start of my coding journey
experienceResume.summary: Began my coding journey by learning the fundamentals of programming and exploring how software is built.
Worked as a crew member at McDonald's, developing teamwork, communication, discipline, and customer service skills in a fast-paced environment.
